IS1In-stock actions · retail flow
Shown under the verdict on ANY in-stock result. All three appear in the retail flow only; hobby results show just "Too far?" (see P6).
In stock. Confirmed.
SHARE YOUR SCORE
Too far?Runnr grabs it
Grabbed it?Post your score
DEV NOTE · PRICE AGGREGATION
One row per store per locked product (product_id + store_id). Every completed check upserts that row: verdict, quoted price, timestamp — the latest answer wins.

BEST = lowest in-stock quote that's still fresh (≤7 days old). Tie goes to the nearer store. No quote on the call → the row shows the verdict only and retail stays the anchor.

Stale quotes (>7 days) grey out to "Last seen $174 · Jun 24" until a new check refreshes them.

Sort: in stock (price asc) → restock day known → unchecked (distance asc) → not in stock.

RN1Runnr · set the deal

RN2Runnr · send the deal & wrap up
‹
Runnr · hand off to a driver
5 quick steps · about 2 min to set up
Booster Box · ×1
Card Kingdom → ship via USPS
IN STOCK
4
SEND THE DEAL
Paste this into the driver chat
Hey! Quick paid pickup. I'll cover the item plus a $25 bonus on drop-off.
1) Add the prepaid card to Apple Pay (60 sec): runner.fungibles.com/d/4QK9
2) Inside Card Kingdom, grab 1 Pitch Black booster box
3) Pay with that card. It only works for this buy
4) Drop it at the USPS to ship
Tap Done and your $25 lands instantly. Thank you!
COPY MESSAGE & LINK
DRIVER SEES · RUNNER.FUNGIBLES.COM/D/4QK9
You've got a $25 pickup
Add card to Apple Pay (60 sec)
1. Inside Card Kingdom, grab the booster box
2. Pay with the card you just added
3. Drop at USPS. Postage is on the card
4. Tap Done. Your $25 lands instantly
Driver said no? Cancel & try the next one
5
WRAP UP
Release the bonus & rate
When the driver taps Done, the card locks and the receipt photo lands here. Confirm to release the bonus.
★★★★★
CONFIRM DROP-OFF · RELEASE $25
Powered by Fungibles · runner.fungibles.com
